compiled_state.title: Skills referenced without 'dso:' prefix in files generated during onboarding
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When onboarding generates project files (e.g. CLAUDE.md, project-understanding.md, or other artifacts), skill references are written without the required 'dso:' namespace prefix (e.g. '/sprint' instead of '/dso:sprint'). This violates the namespace policy enforced by check-skill-refs.sh and produces non-functional skill references.
